subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from the Prisoner unto him who hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting, that none should be worshipped save Him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدی المسجون الی الذی آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم ان لاتعبد الا ایاه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @knowledge; recognition of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
